assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration root route GET / returns 200 with text response
assertionResults.title: GET / returns 200 with text response

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration unknown routes GET /unknown returns 404
assertionResults.title: GET /unknown returns 404

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration unknown routes GET /api/v1/unknown returns 404
assertionResults.title: GET /api/v1/unknown returns 404

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration unknown routes POST /api/v1/unknown returns 404
assertionResults.title: POST /api/v1/unknown returns 404

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration Content-Type header GET /api/v1/apps returns application/json Content-Type
assertionResults.title: GET /api/v1/apps returns application/json Content-Type

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration Content-Type header POST /api/v1/apps returns application/json Content-Type on success
assertionResults.title: POST /api/v1/apps returns application/json Content-Type on success

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration Content-Type header POST /api/v1/apps returns application/json Content-Type on error
assertionResults.title: POST /api/v1/apps returns application/json Content-Type on error

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration malformed body handling POST with non-JSON body falls back to empty body (returns 422)
assertionResults.title: POST with non-JSON body falls back to empty body (returns 422)

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration malformed body handling PUT with no body is accepted as no-op update (200)
assertionResults.title: PUT with no body is accepted as no-op update (200)

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration all app routes are wired POST /api/v1/apps creates an app (201)
assertionResults.title: POST /api/v1/apps creates an app (201)

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration all app routes are wired GET /api/v1/apps lists apps (200)
assertionResults.title: GET /api/v1/apps lists apps (200)

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration all app routes are wired GET /api/v1/apps/:id gets app (200)
assertionResults.title: GET /api/v1/apps/:id gets app (200)

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration all app routes are wired PUT /api/v1/apps/:id updates app (200)
assertionResults.title: PUT /api/v1/apps/:id updates app (200)

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration all app routes are wired DELETE /api/v1/apps/:id deletes app (200)
assertionResults.title: DELETE /api/v1/apps/:id deletes app (200)

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration all todo routes are wired POST /api/v1/apps/:id/todos creates a todo (201)
assertionResults.title: POST /api/v1/apps/:id/todos creates a todo (201)

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration all todo routes are wired GET /api/v1/apps/:id/todos lists todos (200)
assertionResults.title: GET /api/v1/apps/:id/todos lists todos (200)

assertionResults.title: should NOT log validation error responses (422) from POST /api/v1/apps with invalid body

assertionResults.title: should NOT log 409 conflict error from POST /api/v1/auth/signup when email already exists

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration API request/response logging middleware Log Format Specification should include [METHOD] format in log message
assertionResults.title: should include [METHOD] format in log message

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration API request/response logging middleware Log Format Specification should include path after method in log message
assertionResults.title: should include path after method in log message

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration API request/response logging middleware Log Format Specification should include status code (200) in log message
assertionResults.title: should include status code (200) in log message

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration API request/response logging middleware Log Format Specification should include status code (201) in log message for created resources
assertionResults.title: should include status code (201) in log message for created resources

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration API request/response logging middleware Log Format Specification should include response time in milliseconds (ms) in log message
assertionResults.title: should include response time in milliseconds (ms) in log message

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration API request/response logging middleware Log Format Specification should include arrow separator (→) between path and status in log message
assertionResults.title: should include arrow separator (→) between path and status in log message

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration API request/response logging middleware Log Format Specification should have response time in parentheses in log message
assertionResults.title: should have response time in parentheses in log message

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration API request/response logging middleware Multiple API request logging should log multiple sequential successful API requests independently
assertionResults.title: should log multiple sequential successful API requests independently

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration API request/response logging middleware Multiple API request logging should log successful request but not the subsequent failed request
assertionResults.title: should log successful request but not the subsequent failed request

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration API request/response logging middleware Response time measurement accuracy should measure response time in milliseconds with numeric value
assertionResults.title: should measure response time in milliseconds with numeric value

assertionResults.fullName: HonoApp integration API request/response logging middleware Response time measurement accuracy should record response time as positive integer for successful requests
assertionResults.title: should record response time as positive integer for successful requests
